+ add
Timeline
9:41●●●●
Your journey
+
Today
😊11:42 PM

Went on a date tonight with Maya. It just flowed — we talked for 3 hours and I didn't check my phone once.

dating
🔥2:15 PM

Closed the EURUSD trade at +47 pips. That rush never gets old. Discipline paid off — I waited for the setup.

tradingwin
9:02 AM

Remember to buy spike ball for the weekend.

Yesterday
😔8:30 PM

She ghosted me. Three days of no reply. I'm trying to not spiral. Writing this helps a little.

Semantic tokens (mode-adaptive)

Components only reference these. They remap when the theme changes — no per-component branching.

bgpage background
surfacecard / input
surface-sunkensubtle fill
accentCTA, focus
text-primarybody copy
text-secondarymeta, hints
borderhairlines

Primitive palette (brand)

Static paint box. Tweak here later to restyle the whole app in minutes.

coral-500#FF5D73 · primary
peach-500#FF9A6B · CTA grad
indigo-500#7F7FD5 · brand grad
sky-500#86A8E7 · secondary
ink-900#0B0B0F · dark bg
ink-50#F5F5F7 · dark text
grad-brandlogo, key moments

Typography

DM Sans — one family, weights 400 / 500 / 600 / 700 / 800.

Display · 28/32

Title · 18/24

Body · 14/22 · the default

Caption · 11/14

Motion & shape

Radii: sm 8 · md 14 · lg 20 · xl 24 · full 9999

Spacing scale: 4 · 8 · 12 · 16 · 24 · 32 · 48

Theme swap: 220ms ease cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1) on bg / color / border.

Interaction: 120ms fast on hover/tap; 360ms for entry-save optimistic fades.

Toggle light / dark above to see the full palette swap. This is the locked theme system for feelike. Components reference only semantic tokens (bg, surface, accent, …); the primitive palette is the one place to edit if we ever re-skin.
